title: InputSampler.java - MapReduce Input Sampling Utility
description: This Java file, InputSampler.java, is part of Apache Hadoop MapReduce's lib/partition directory. It defines a utility class, InputSampler, for collecting input data samples. The class includes three sampler types: SplitSampler, RandomSampler, and IntervalSampler, each implementing a Sampler interface with distinct sampling strategies. The core logic involves using a chosen sampler to obtain a sample keyset, sorting it, and writing it to a partition file. This process supports efficient data partitioning in MapReduce jobs, enhancing performance and resource utilization. The class depends on various Hadoop and Java standard library classes for its functionality.
